name: TSAKOS ENERGY NAVIGATION LTD
summary: Tsakos Energy Navigation Limited is a leading international provider of seaborne crude oil and petroleum product transportation services. Headquartered in Athens, Greece, TEN's modern fleet includes tankers ranging from VLCCs to product tankers, serving a diverse customer base of oil companies, refiners, and traders. The company focuses on safe and reliable operations, with a commitment to environmental protection.
